title: How Big Were Squid Game and Bluey in 2025? The Year in TV Ratings
text: The Hollywood Reporter covered the biggest shows of 2025 by TV ratings data. Squid Game 3 was one of the most watched shows, particularly globally where it ranked among the top Netflix releases of the year. Bluey continued its dominance on Disney+ and in overall viewership. Stranger Things maintained significant cultural relevance. The article discusses how 2025 demonstrated the shift toward streaming content, with traditional broadcast television ratings declining as viewers increasingly turned to streaming platforms. Netflix's global reach and content library continued to dominate search trends and viewership metrics throughout the year. The data showed that animated content, Korean dramas, and psychological thrillers were among the most popular genres generating search interest and viewership hours on streaming platforms.
